g.text: Breakthrough-only selection favors velocity memory, not universal adequacy

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 14.1px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #102a43

g.text: A model can arrive correctly and still forget the plume

text.style: font-size: 9.15px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #64748b

g.text: Breakthrough-only validation selects arrival memory, but other observables expose unsafe forgetting.
